nasb.text: Now then let the fear of the Lord be upon you; be very careful what you do, for the Lord our God will have no part in unrighteousness or partiality or the taking of a bribe.”

esv.text: Now then, let the fear of the Lord be upon you. Be careful what you do, for there is no injustice with the Lord our God, or partiality or taking bribes.”

cnv.text: 現在你們要敬畏耶和華；你們要謹慎行事，因為耶和華我們的　神沒有不義，不偏待人，也不受賄賂。”

ccb.text: 现在你们应当敬畏耶和华，谨慎办事，因为我们的上帝耶和华毫无不义，不偏待人，不受贿赂。”
